updates.name: Cursor Automations
updates.description: Brand-new agentic coding system that auto-launches AI agents triggered by commits, Slack messages, or timers — enabling continuous code review, security audits, and incident response without prompt-and-monitor loops. Hundreds of automations running per hour.

updates.name: GPT-5.3 Instant
updates.description: OpenAI's new default ChatGPT model with 26.8% fewer hallucinations, better web search integration woven into contextual answers, and a less preachy conversational tone. Free for all ChatGPT users.

updates.name: Google Flow Unified Workspace
updates.description: Google merged Flow, Whisk, and ImageFX into one AI creative studio with Veo 3.1 video generation, lasso-based natural language editing, and full project migration from Whisk/ImageFX.

updates.name: Perplexity Computer
updates.description: Autonomous multi-agent system that plans, builds, and executes complex workflows using 19 AI models. Creates sub-agents on the fly and can run tasks for hours or months.

updates.name: Notion Custom Agents
updates.description: Autonomous AI agents that automate recurring work across Notion, Slack, Mail, and Calendar. Set a trigger or schedule and they run 24/7. Free to try through May 2026.

updates.name: CompactifAI App
updates.description: Run advanced AI models fully offline on your phone with no cloud dependency. Built for mobile professionals and privacy-sensitive orgs, with optional cloud API fallback.

updates.name: Gmail AI (Gemini 3)
updates.description: Gmail's Gemini-powered overhaul adds AI Overviews that summarize long threads, smart compose with Help Me Write, one-click Suggested Replies, and an AI Inbox that filters clutter.

updates.name: Pomelli Photoshoot + Animate
updates.description: Google Labs' Pomelli now transforms product photos into studio-quality shots with Nano Banana image gen, plus one-click video animations via Veo 3.1. Completely free.

updates.name: Wispr Flow for Android
updates.description: AI voice-to-text with auto-editing, filler word removal, and 100+ language translation. Now on Android with a floating bubble interface and 30% faster dictation from infra rewrite.

updates.name: Google Pixel March Drop — AI Features
updates.description: Multi-object recognition in Circle to Search, AI-generated icon styles, Magic Cue for in-chat Gemini suggestions, and Now Playing as a standalone music discovery app.
